tasks.bench:check: deno bench --allow-read --allow-env --json benches/assert.bench.ts benches/context.bench.ts benches/utils.bench.ts | deno run --allow-read --allow-write --allow-env scripts/check-benchmarks.ts
tasks.bench:update: deno bench --allow-read --allow-env --json benches/assert.bench.ts benches/context.bench.ts benches/utils.bench.ts | deno run --allow-read --allow-write --allow-env scripts/check-benchmarks.ts --save
